title: Basic Smooth WorldGen Datapack
body:
## A **VERY** simple Minecraft WorldGen datapack featuring most vanilla biomes and a few custom biomes such as: 
<details>
<summary> Flowery Fields </summary>
  A plains variant with a lot of flowers, commonly found around the lower Meadow areas. 
</details>
<details>
<summary> Cold Flowery Fields </summary> 
  Colder Plains variant that combines the colder aesthetic of the taiga with Meadow like ammounts of Blue/White flowers.
</details>
<details>
<summary> Pumpkin Fields </summary>
  Colder Plains variant with lots of pumpkins (some of them jack o lanterns) and yellow/orange flowers.
</details>
<details>
<summary> Autumnal Forest </summary>
  Cold Forest variant that is hybrid between the normal and dark forest with autumn like visuals.
</details>
<details>
<summary> Shattered Peaks </summary>
  A mountain variant of the pale garden.
</details>
<details>
<summary> Cherry Fields </summary>
  A Plains variant of the cherry grove featuring smaller trees and more flowers.
</details>
<details>
<summary> Bog </summary>
  A shore version of the swamp with a lot of tall grass and increased bog spawnrates.
</details>
<details>
<summary> Lush Jungle </summary>
  A jungle biome with savanna like trees, moss on the ground and a higher concentration of trees.
</details>

## This is a passion project and it might not be supported at a later date
If You have any questions dm me on discord >>"mc_marmaj"<<
